'''gathudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docimasia|docimasia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docimasia|docimasia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gathudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæthidhith|gæthidhith]] || [[word:gæthidhij|gæthidhij]] || [[word:gæthidhish|gæthidhish]] || [[word:gæthidhi|gæthidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gathuthudhuth|gathuthudhuth]] || [[word:gathuthudhuj|gathuthudhuj]] || [[word:gathuthudhush|gathuthudhush]] || [[word:gathuthudhu|gathuthudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gathudhuth|gathudhuth]] || [[word:gathudhuj|gathudhuj]] || [[word:gathudhush|gathudhush]] || [[word:gathudhu|gathudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gathufdhufth|gathufdhufth]] || [[word:gathufdhufj|gathufdhufj]] || [[word:gathufdhufsh|gathufdhufsh]] || [[word:gathufdhuf|gathufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gathudhuthu|gathudhuthu]] || [[word:gathudhuju|gathudhuju]] || [[word:gathudhushu|gathudhushu]] || [[word:gathudhuku|gathudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gathudhuth|gathudhuth]] || [[word:gathudhuj|gathudhuj]] || [[word:gathudhush|gathudhush]] || [[word:gathudhu|gathudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gathudhuthul|gathudhuthul]] || [[word:gathudhujul|gathudhujul]] || [[word:gathudhushul|gathudhushul]] || [[word:gathudhukul|gathudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gathudhuuthuthu|gathudhuuthuthu]] || [[word:gathudhuujuju|gathudhuujuju]] || [[word:gathudhuushushu|gathudhuushushu]] || [[word:gathudhuuku|gathudhuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gathudhuthun|gathudhuthun]] || [[word:gathudhujun|gathudhujun]] || [[word:gathudhushun|gathudhushun]] || [[word:gathudhukun|gathudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gathudhuthuoro|gathudhuthuoro]] || [[word:gathudhujuoro|gathudhujuoro]] || [[word:gathudhushuoro|gathudhushuoro]] || [[word:gathudhukuoro|gathudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==

{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
